_comment: Each dimension: 5 pts if ANY signal word appears in title+text+tags. Max 25. Edit signals freely.

novelty.label: New tools & product launches
novelty.description: Is this a new tool, OSS release, or product launch worth tracking?

practicality.label: Use cases & implementation
practicality.description: Real implementations, step-by-step workflows, adoption stories — things someone can act on

evidence.label: Evidence & measurable results
evidence.description: Demos, benchmarks, ROI numbers, GitHub repos, screenshots — not just theory

content_value.label: Writing & insight value
content_value.description: Learnings, opinions, comparisons, surveys — things worth writing about for a blog or newsletter

japan_fit.label: Japan market specifics
japan_fit.description: JP-only tools, enterprise/SMB Japan adoption, Japanese-language AI, culturally specific use cases

_tuning_notes: Lower threshold to 10 to see more results. Raise to 18+ for top-tier only.
Add signals to content_value if you want more blog-worthy content.
Add signals to japan_fit to weight JP enterprise adoption more heavily.
All scoring is keyword-based (binary). Semantic scoring requires the Claude API summarize step.
